---
title: "Today's Top Stories"
format: 
  dashboard:
    logo: fig/candoso.png
    orientation: columns
---

## column {width="35%"}

Placeholder text for the left column.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| label: packages
head(starwars)
```

## column {width="65%"}

### Row {height="10%"}

Placeholder text for the top row, column 2.

#### Row {height="70%"}

#### Row {height="20%"}
